lines.english: Why did Hugh's diet not work?
lines.chinese: 休的节食为什么没有成功？
lines.raw: Why did Hugh's diet not work? | 休的节食为什么没有成功？

lines.english: My friend, Hugh, has always been fat,
lines.raw: My friend, Hugh, has always been fat, | 我的朋友休一直很胖，

lines.english: but things got so bad recently that he decided to go on a diet.
lines.chinese: 但最近情况变得如此糟糕，以至于他决定节食。
lines.raw: but things got so bad recently that he decided to go on a diet. | 但最近情况变得如此糟糕，以至于他决定节食。

lines.english: He began his diet a week ago.
lines.raw: He began his diet a week ago. | 他一周前开始节食。

lines.english: First of all, he wrote out a long list of all the foods which were forbidden.
lines.chinese: 首先，他列出了一长串所有被禁止的食物。
lines.raw: First of all, he wrote out a long list of all the foods which were forbidden. | 首先，他列出了一长串所有被禁止的食物。

lines.english: The list included most of the things Hugh loves:
lines.chinese: 清单上包括了休喜欢的大部分东西：
lines.raw: The list included most of the things Hugh loves: | 清单上包括了休喜欢的大部分东西：

lines.english: butter, potatoes, rice, beer, milk, chocolate, and sweets.
lines.chinese: 黄油、土豆、米饭、啤酒、牛奶、巧克力和糖果。
lines.raw: butter, potatoes, rice, beer, milk, chocolate, and sweets. | 黄油、土豆、米饭、啤酒、牛奶、巧克力和糖果。

lines.english: Yesterday I paid him a visit.
lines.raw: Yesterday I paid him a visit. | 昨天我去看望了他。

lines.english: I rang the bell and was not surprised to see that Hugh was still as fat as ever.
lines.chinese: 我按响了门铃，毫不意外地看到休仍然和以前一样胖。
lines.raw: I rang the bell and was not surprised to see that Hugh was still as fat as ever. | 我按响了门铃，毫不意外地看到休仍然和以前一样胖。

lines.english: He led me into his room and hurriedly hid a large parcel under his desk.
lines.chinese: 他把我带进他的房间，然后匆忙地把一个大包裹藏到书桌下。
lines.raw: He led me into his room and hurriedly hid a large parcel under his desk. | 他把我带进他的房间，然后匆忙地把一个大包裹藏到书桌下。

lines.english: It was obvious that he was very embarrassed.
lines.raw: It was obvious that he was very embarrassed. | 显然他感到非常尴尬。

lines.english: When I asked him what he was doing,
lines.raw: When I asked him what he was doing, | 当我问他在做什么时，

lines.english: he smiled guiltily and then put the parcel on the desk.
lines.chinese: 他内疚地笑了笑，然后把包裹放在了书桌上。
lines.raw: he smiled guiltily and then put the parcel on the desk. | 他内疚地笑了笑，然后把包裹放在了书桌上。

lines.english: He explained that his diet was so strict that he had to reward himself occasionally.
lines.chinese: 他解释说他的节食计划太严格了，所以他偶尔需要奖励一下自己。
lines.raw: He explained that his diet was so strict that he had to reward himself occasionally. | 他解释说他的节食计划太严格了，所以他偶尔需要奖励一下自己。

lines.english: Then he showed me the contents of the parcel.
lines.chinese: 接着他给我看了包裹里的东西。
lines.raw: Then he showed me the contents of the parcel. | 接着他给我看了包裹里的东西。

lines.english: It contained five large bars of chocolate and three bags of sweets!
lines.chinese: 里面有五大块巧克力和三袋糖果！
lines.raw: It contained five large bars of chocolate and three bags of sweets! | 里面有五大块巧克力和三袋糖果！
